_comment: Community source file. Fork Velaris-App-OS/Marketplace, copy this into community/<your-github-handle>/source.json, and point download_url at your hosted .hxapp. Your package is ALWAYS Community tier — tier is derived from the source URL's org + the official registry, never from this file. Open a PR; validate-pr checks schema + checksum + tags.
name: Your App Name
description: One-line description of what your app does.
